xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: Survey No. 211/1, Opp. Sector - C & Metalman, Sanwer Road Industrial Area, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India, 452015
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: Survey No. 211/1, Opp. Sector - C & Metalman, Sanwer Road Industrial Area, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India, 452015
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Manufacturing of Electronic Two Wheeler Vehicle
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Manufacturing of Electronic Two Wheeler Vehicle
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Operation and Maintenance of Solar Plants
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Operation and Maintenance of Solar Plants
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Manufacturing of Electronic Two Wheeler Vehicle
Operation and Maintenance of Solar Plants
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: A brief on types of customers: 1. Business-to-Business (B2B) : Business Organizations including Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs). 2. Business-to-Consumers (B2C: individual Retail Consumers. 3. Business-to-Government (B2G): Government Organizations and Public Sector Undertakings.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Poor quality of Services and products can lead to loss of customers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: We utilise multiple channels to engage with our customers and gather constant feedback. This enables us to continuously evaluate and improve our services.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Higher employee turnover will lead to lower productivity and loss of tacit knowledge
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Priorities employee engagement, refine recruitment and onboarding processes, offer competitive compensation and benefits, provide ongoing development opportunities, promote work-life balance, and conduct thorough exit interviews for feedback. These steps help retain talent, sustain productivity, and safeguard tacit knowledge within the organisation.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Violations of human rights can result in significant reputational damage

"While climate change and associated risks such as adverse weather events are increasingly evident and pose operational challenges across industries, for our company—actively engaged in the renewable energy sector—this represents a significant opportunity. The global transition toward sustainable energy sources positions us favorably to contribute to and benefit from climate resilience efforts. By proactively addressing climate-related risks, we can enhance our operational sustainability, strengthen stakeholder confidence, and capitalize on the growing demand for clean energy solutions."

Diversity and inclusion are crucial aspects of being an equal opportunity employer. With the growing emphasis on unique skill sets from a diverse workforce, this area represents a significant reputational risk factor.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: We promote workplace diversity to enhance the organisation’s collective experience and skill set, with a focus on improving diversity at all levels. We foster the right work culture through effective policies and processes which encourages diversity in workplace
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Delay in Government Subsidy by Various reasons.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Based upon the government subsidy rate finalized, market price of the product is determined after considering other miscellaneous factors.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: Performance of each of the principle is reviewed periodically by the various committees led by the Management and Board of the Directors.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Name: Mr. Anurag Mundra Designation: Director DIN: 00113172
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Yes, CSR Committee of the Board is looking into the Sustainability related issues.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfOtherFrequencyFor: All the policies of the Company are approved by the Board and reviewed periodically or on a need basis by the Managing Director. During the review, the effectiveness of the Policies is evaluated and necessary amendments to Policies and procedures are implemented.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Workshops on communication skills, technical skills.
Mock drills, fire safety trainings related parameters.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: Boards of Directors of the company are governed by code of business conduct and ethics which also provide for detailed provisions on conflict of interest.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableAnEqu: No disabled employees in the company during the year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Human Resource Department is responsible for redress grievences of permanent workers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: The Safety& Health Management system covers activities across all manufacturing locations and offices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: The Company has a process for Risk Management which is essential for preventing accidents, injuries, occupational disease, emergency control& prevention and business continuity. Considering the hazards associated with operations and hazardous chemicals used, sites have deployed structured Hazard Assessment, Risk Assessment and Management Process - both qualitative and quantitative which is regularly reviewed and mitigation plans are put in place for high-risk areas. The process also considers roles and responsibilities, monitoring control measures, competency training and awareness of individuals associated with such activities. Formal risk assessment training has been provided as appropriate.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company's commitment to its safety management programmes follows top-down approach with the senior management persistently working towards establishing, demonstrating, sustaining and improving the safety culture and incorporating the Company's core value of safety in their daily responsibilities. The employees are specially trained to tackle any potential hazards that may arise in the course of their work in all the cities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: The Company’s management undertakes a review of all accidents and incidents, and formulate procedures based on risk analysis of data gathered through various assessment tools. This data is used for predictive analysis, measurement of incidents and unsafe behaviors. This enables identification of the key areas of risk which in turn guides the projects to proactively manage and focus resources to prevent any accidents or incidents.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company has systems in place to provide financial assistance to the legal dependents of the employees and workers in case of death while in-service.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Senior Management determines internal and external group of stakeholders which has immediate impact on the company, this include shareholder, employees, customers, suppliers, bankers and Government.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Operational efficiencies, communication, health, safety and engagement initiatives
Product quality and availability, responsiveness to needs, after sales Support.
Sharing Financial Position and taking financial assistance.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: All the human rights issues are reported to personal department. Reported grievances are reviewed and proper enquiry is made by personal department and findings of the same are reported to Senior Management.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksforComplaintsExplanator: There is no sexual harassment complaint during the year.
There is no complaint regarding discrimination at work place during the year.
There is no complaint regarding child labour at work place during the year. Our company prohibits the child labour.
There is no complaint regarding forced labour and involuntary labour at work place during the year.
There is no complaint with respect to wages during the year. The Company paid timly wages to their workers.
There is no complaint with respect to other human rights related issues during the year.
There is no sexual harassment complaint during the year.
There is no complaint regarding discrimination at work place during the year.
There is no complaint regarding child labour at work place during the year. Our company prohibits the child labour.
There is no complaint regarding forced labour and involuntary labour at work place during the year.
There is no complaint with respect to wages during the year. The Company paid timly wages to their workers.
There is no complaint with respect to other human rights related issues during the year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: As part of Whistle blower Policy and POSH Policy, the Company has a section mentioned on the protection of identity of the complainant. All such matters are dealt in strict confidence.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No adverse cases came up during the assessment by the entity.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: No such grievances on Human Rights violations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: No such due diligence conducted yet.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: As we are not generating any waste water by our process, we can consider our operations as zero water discharge plant. The domestic effluent we are generating is also negligible, what is generally coming out from the toilet and washing facilities provided to the workforce at sites. Despite of that we are maximizing the use of dry portable urinals wherever possible to reduce it further.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: An authorized person is available at all sites to receive public grievances. If any grievances are reported, a meeting with the complainant and other stakeholders will be convened for resolution, following the outlined procedures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The Company has well-defined systems for receiving and responding to consumer complaints and feedback. Consumers can share their complaints and feedback via email. Timely and effective redressal of concerns and complaints raised by our stakeholders is a key priority for our business. All grievances are resolved within a specified timeframe with a final resolution
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: Not Applicable considering the nature of Company’s product and services offerings.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImpactOfDataBreachesE: Not Applicable considering the nature of Company’s product and services offerings
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The Information can be accessed at the website of the Company i.e. www.ujaas.com.
